name: Google Workspace MFA Enforced
description: Ensures all Google Workspace users have MFA enabled
remediation: Enable 2-Step Verification (MFA) for all Google Workspace users. Configure organizational policy to enforce MFA.
remediation_steps: Navigate to Google Admin Console > Security > 2-Step Verification
Enable 'Allow users to turn on 2-Step Verification'
Set enforcement policy to require 2-Step Verification
Monitor enrollment status and follow up with non-compliant users
